name: aws-serverless
description: Design, build, deploy, test, and debug serverless applications with AWS Serverless services.

interface.shortDescription: Build Lambda, API Gateway, Step Functions, and SAM or CDK workflows.
interface.longDescription: AWS serverless expertise for Lambda, API Gateway, durable functions, and deployment workflows with SAM or CDK.

Generate CDK for a serverless workflow.
